headline: Peptide medicine made accessible.
subheadline: FDA Category 1 peptides + physician oversight + AI-powered personalization — all in one DTC platform.

sections.title: The Problem
sections.body: Peptide therapy is fragmented across grey-market sources, opaque compounding pharmacies, and practitioners who lack digital infrastructure. Patients can’t safely self-navigate; physicians lack tooling to scale oversight.

sections.title: The Solution
sections.body: Peppy closes the loop: a curated formulary of FDA Category 1 peptides, a licensed physician consultation layer (Pepp Talk), and a personalized stack builder (Pepp Rally) — all within a HIPAA-compliant Phoenix LiveView platform.

sections.title: Traction
sections.body: v0.1.0 live on Azure Container Apps. 8 peptides in Tier 1 formulary. DevTools + UAT pipeline active. iOS SwiftUI app in parallel development.

sections.title: Technical Foundation
sections.body: Elixir/Phoenix for fault-tolerant real-time UI. PostgreSQL for HIPAA-compliant encrypted storage. Azure Container Apps for scalable deployment. bcrypt session auth with progressive token expiry.

versions.label: Alpha
versions.notes: Initial Azure deployment. Formulary live. Session auth. DevTools active.
